7.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. It can cause buffer overflow and leads to undefined behavior. Most modern compilers (like GCC) will refuse to compile code using 'gets', resulting in a compilation error. Use 'fgets' instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. It can cause buffer overflow and leads to undefined behavior. Most modern compilers (like GCC) will refuse to compile code using 'gets', resulting in a compilation error. Use 'fgets' instead.]
